21019001--.uiDescription: It's the first day of filming, but the big star is nowhere to be found! Time is short, and the director is desparate to find a replacement actor. This is your chance to make your TV debut, and take a shot at stardom! Will you step into the spotlight?

21023001-PirateOcean-.name: Guardian of the Seas
21023001-PirateOcean-.uiDescription: The reclusive guardian's call reverberates from the depths of the ocean. Seized by a dark rage, he bellows in warning. What exactly is he trying to tell the humans above?

21022001-PirateOcean-.name: The Song of the Oracle
21022001-PirateOcean-.uiDescription: The siren sisters who dwell upon $map:02000391$ are said to be as beautiful as their song. But the sudden influx of unwelcome guests has filled them with rage. Placate them and learn what they know of the message coming from the ocean.

21025001-DarkCastle-.name: Madrakan's Heart
21025001-DarkCastle-.uiDescription: A small crack can grow and eventually lead to the downfall of an impenetrable fortress. The Maple Alliance has put together an elite team to invade Madrakan. It's time to end one of the greatest threats to the Maple Alliance!

21024001-DarkCastle-.name: Madrakan Ramparts
21024001-DarkCastle-.uiDescription: The siege of Madrakan, the stronghold of Madria, has begun! The Maple Alliance has it surrounded, but its thick castle walls are preventing entry. The only way to conquer Madrakan now is to somehow storm the gateway—a task for a true hero!

21026001-DarkCastle-.name: Chateau of Grief
21026001-DarkCastle-.uiDescription: A huge manor has been discovered at one corner of the Shadow Gate. It's deserted, but there's a malicious aura all around it. What happened in there, so long ago?

21021001-SnowKingdom-.name: Icethorn Ridge
21021001-SnowKingdom-.uiDescription: It is said that at the foot of a mountain, hidden within a raging snowstorm, a secret path to a lost kingdom awaits. The path appears to precious few, and those who see it are frightened away by a terrifying cry. Who or what could be hiding there?

20002001--JP.uiDescription: The ancient people who revered the sacred Bayar Mountain as a holy land are said to have embedded Stones of Wisdom into the rocks of the Bayar Range and created giant golems to protect it. Now, with the ancient civilization gone and most Bayars vanished... the last Bayar, guardian of the Bashtai Peak in the Bayar Range, has awakened.
20002001--JP.name: The Last Bayar

20009001--JP.uiDescription: The Mark 52 series — lethal war robots secretly developed by Dr. Katronic! The Mark 52 Beta is a more powerful model that addresses the shortcomings of the Mark 52 Alpha. The reason Dr. Katronic developed these dangerous robots remains unknown. Based on the research records, it is speculated that they were created for the public good.
20009001--JP.name: Revolt of the War Robots

20015001--JP.uiDescription: Shuhu, once the kindest and most warm-hearted creature on the snowy plains, was struck in the heart by a poison arrow in a tragic accident, and froze her heart with shards of cold ice to survive. Now cruel and destructive, Shuhu has lured her old companion, the giant Bubus, into committing merciless acts of evil — the two moving as one...
20015001--JP.name: Blue Shadow Cave

20003001--JP.name: Horus's Nest
20003001--JP.uiDescription: Long ago, the peak of $map:02000009$ was a forest surrounded by massive ancient trees, and within it lay the nest of Horus — who dreamed of revenge against the humans who coveted her eggs. As the great trees were felled one by one over time, Horus's Nest, once hidden among them, finally revealed itself... Will Horus's wings be broken?

20001001--JP.name: Forgotten Bayar
20001001--JP.uiDescription: The ancient civilization that once took root on the sacred Bayar Mountain vanished long ago... yet relics of those ancient peoples still appear in unexpected places throughout the land. A frigid ice cave tucked in a quiet corner of the coastline... and deep within it, the cold-hearted <font color='#00aaef'>$npc:23000006$</font> has awakened.

20005001--JP.name: Forest of Chaos
20005001--JP.uiDescription: A monster that serves the Dark Lord and wreaks havoc upon the world—<font color='#00aaef'>$npc:23000025$</font>! Freely wielding the deep dark energy that pervades the Ellinia Forest, it is said to be fully unleashing its wicked instincts.

21005001--JP.uiDescription: There were those who broke the taboos by slipping through the Guard's iron surveillance net... These are fences who frequently come and go through the Dark Lands, engaging in illegal dealings. Let's thoroughly investigate the hideout of these fences, known as 'Brokers'!
21005001--JP.name: Golden Tower 7F

21006001--JP.uiDescription: There are those who slip through the Royal Guard's airtight surveillance and break every taboo... These are the fences who constantly come and go through the Dark Land, engaging in illicit trade. Let's thoroughly investigate the den of these fences, known as 'Brokers'!
21006001--JP.name: Golden Tower 4F

21002001--JP.uiDescription: Life is the source of all existence! The Life Barrier that maintains the balance and order of that power is beginning to falter. Someone has set their sights on the Green Lapenta of Life and seeks to destroy the barrier... We must protect the Life Barrier from this unknown enemy!
21002001--JP.name: Rift of Life

21007001--JP.uiDescription: There are those who slip through the Royal Guard's airtight surveillance and break every taboo... These are the fences who constantly come and go through the Dark Land, engaging in illicit trade. Let's thoroughly investigate the den of these fences, known as 'Brokers'!
21007001--JP.name: Golden Elevator

21001001--JP.uiDescription: The beautiful cherry blossom forest was once home to the dwarf fairies known as the Bolobolo. Small and weak, the Bolobolo retreated ever deeper into the forest to escape threats, and their existence was gradually forgotten. But one day, sorrowful cries began echoing from the cherry blossom forest... What has happened in the woods?
21001001--JP.name: Secret of the Cherry Blossom Forest

21004001--JP.uiDescription: The majestic Tria Royal Palace, and the palace underground that stretches deep within it! From within the still darkness comes a terrified scream. What on earth is happening beyond those firmly sealed doors?
21004001--JP.name: Royal Palace Basement

21014001--JP.uiDescription: The moment the moon loses its light, an unknown dark shadow engulfs $map:02010047$. Taking advantage of the weakening of light, an ancient shaman who controls the flow of power is about to spread dark wings toward the world once more.
21014001--JP.name: Casa del Luna

21018001--JP.uiDescription: We thought it was all over. We believed every cursed tie and deep darkness had been severed. But the Seed of Darkness harbored by the Demon King's son has once again sprouted and taken root... Where does this deep darkness end?
21018001--JP.name: The Other Side of Darkness

21016001-ShrineOfGuidance-JP.uiDescription: The <font color='#00aaef'>disciples of Guidance</font>, who lost not only their home but also their wise master to $npcName:11001559$, who seeks to claim the sacred relic—legacy of Spirit One, founder of Guidance. After a long pursuit of the relic's whereabouts, they arrive at the <font color='#00aaef'>Shrine of the Guide</font> with hope of stopping $npcName:11001559$, only to find that darkness has gotten there ahead of them…
21016001-ShrineOfGuidance-JP.name: Shrine of Guidance

21010001--JP.uiDescription: The waterway flowing through the village originates underground. Fearing that the water will stop, the villagers offer sacrifices to the ruler of the underground cavern. Just who is this ruler of the underground cavern that the villagers so fear?
21010001--JP.name: Cold Wind Cave

21013001--JP.uiDescription: The shadow world of darkness ruled by the Demon King... A legend has been passed down here. The <font color='#00aaef'>Seed of Darkness</font>, said to hold the power to birth a new heir to the Demon King! Should it sprout and take root, the black darkness will devour the world…
21013001--JP.name: Roots of Darkness

25001001--JP.name: Corrupted Garden

25000001--JP.uiDescription: $npc:21800006$, who is said to share a special bond with $npc:11000134$, created this Phantom Training Ground to improve the skills of the Murpagos warriors. $npc:21800006$ puts the courage and mettle of all challengers to the test!
25000001--JP.name: Trial of Valor

29002001-ItemDungeon-JP.uiDescription: Pippi's secret warehouse, hidden within the flow of time! This is where new inventions destined to cause trouble in Maple World are created. Teach Pippi a lesson before they can come up with yet another new invention!
29002001-ItemDungeon-JP.name: [Thursday] Pipi's Secret Stash

25003001--JP.uiDescription: A wild boar herd from beyond $map:2000334$ has swarmed in and is recklessly attacking the walls. We can't let the wild boars seize the watchtower! Defend $map:2000334$ from the boar herd!
25003001--JP.name: Watchtower Ramparts

25008001--JP.uiDescription:
The <font color='#00aaef'>Dark Stream</font>—black tendrils of shadow that serve as conduits for the vast darkness grown from the <font color='#00aaef'>Seed of Darkness</font>, spreading in all directions! Clear away the deep darkness and sever the shadow tendrils before they spread further!

<font color='#00aaef'>Abandoning the dungeon midway will prevent you from earning any score or rewards.</font>

<font color='#FFD400'>[Adventurers stronger than the monsters at this location will have their stats adjusted]</font>
25008001--JP.name: Dark Stream

25002001--JP.uiDescription: The Monkey gang has kidnapped the hens around $map:02000087$ and locked them in a coop! The pot of water is already boiling, so there isn't much time left to save the hens. Rescue them from the coop before they end up in the pot!
25002001--JP.name: Operation: Rescue the Hen

25009001--JP.uiDescription: A pyramid where glimpses of the fallen Merjit Kingdom's glory can still be seen. But recently, the dead have been awakening here. What could be drawing them back from death? Venture into the pyramid to uncover its secrets.
25009001--JP.name: Phantom Pyramid

25004001--JP.uiDescription: Children who were playing hide-and-seek in $map:02000331$, where pink petals flutter beautifully. Hiding throughout the forest paths to escape from a grumpy wizard, they are waiting for someone to help them. Help these innocent children in danger and get them to safety.

25010001--JP.name: Frozen Temple

21003001--JP.name: Poison Cave
21003001--JP.uiDescription: Massive streams of toxic fluid seep throughout the Dark Lands! Said to flow alongside the venom that floods all the way to Maple World with its lethal toxicity are secrets that someone desperately wants buried!

21008001--JP.name: Ludibrium Time Hole
